title: Things — What is next?
description: *Things* is a **task and project management app** fully developed by myself, that intelligently suggests tasks based on user availability, allowing for effortless prioritization. Built to offer an accessible solution across all modern devices.

The app features **real-time synchronization** and **prioritization algorithms** developed following TDD, boasting robust and  dynamic scheduling capabilities, empowering users to focus on what matters most.
